decisions.context: Interpret: find other high-end Claude Code setups and compare to MetaBlooms

options.name: Narrow: only official Anthropic examples
options.reason: user said high-end, implying best-in-class across the ecosystem

options.name: Broad: community repos, blog posts, case studies, official docs
pros: captures full landscape of advanced setups
options.reason: user wants genuine comparison — need breadth to find real peers

decisions.selected: Broad: community repos, blog posts, case studies, official docs

decisions.context: How to find high-end Claude Code setups — what sources to search

options.name: Single broad search
options.reason: high-end setups are scattered across different contexts

options.name: Parallel targeted searches: CLAUDE.md patterns, hooks, MCP, agentic workflows, known power users
pros: covers all vectors of advanced setup
options.reason: high-end setups manifest differently — some are hook-heavy, some MCP-heavy, some CLAUDE.md-heavy; need all angles

decisions.selected: Parallel targeted searches: CLAUDE.md patterns, hooks, MCP, agentic workflows, known power users

decisions.context: Comparison format — how to structure MetaBlooms vs others

options.name: Prose narrative
cons: hard to scan, buries key differentiators
options.reason: comparison tables are more useful for this type of analysis

options.name: Structured comparison table + per-setup deep dive + gap/lead analysis
options.reason: user needs to know exactly where MetaBlooms leads, lags, and is unique

decisions.selected: Structured comparison table + per-setup deep dive + gap/lead analysis
